nodes.label: AI as efficient literature and data processing tool
nodes.grounding_span: using it to find papers on a specific topic and extract key information from the papers and then link the papers so I dont have to spend my time sifting through irrelevant papers

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the model kept providing incorrect information or hallucinating source papers

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner with human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate with the AI, providing an initial prompt to direct the AI but then providing repeated adjustments

nodes.label: Preservation of manual analytical skills
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: I think it is important to maintain the skills as there are times where the AI is unable to find the information you desire

nodes.label: Workplace peer influence on AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: observing them provide specific requests and always ask for sources has better informed me to do the same

nodes.label: Research efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: they were able to compare and filter literature and data at a greater rate than doing it manually

nodes.label: Epistemic reliability and truth
nodes.grounding_span: the model kept providing incorrect information or hallucinating source papers, making the information difficult to confirm and unreliable

nodes.label: Professional competence and self-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: it is important to not lose these skills as while they are more time consuming, they are what you will fall back on if AI fails

nodes.label: Positive adoption of AI for literature and data tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will integrate AI more into my work to better find relevant literature and perform further data analysis

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination and unreliability
nodes.grounding_span: I was frustrated when I was trying to find papers referring to a specific enzyme ... the model kept providing incorrect information or hallucinating source papers

nodes.label: Cautious trust requiring oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I do not think it is reliable enough to run a task without oversight

nodes.label: Valuing skill preservation as fallback
nodes.grounding_span: I think it is important to maintain the skills as there are times where the AI is unable to find the information you desire

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative refinement — adjusts prompts based on AI output
nodes.grounding_span: providing an initial prompt to direct the AI but then providing repeated adjustments as new information is provided
